channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: $50,000 short-term CD vs. $50,000 money market account: Here's which will earn more interest now
item.description: A $50,000 deposit will grow differently in a short-term CD than in a money market account, especially now.

item.title: WATCH: No Doubt at the Las Vegas Sphere
item.description: "GMA" goes behind the scenes with No Doubt as the reunited band launches its first Las Vegas residency at Sphere.

item.title: Colorado elections clerk set to be released from prison Monday based on her sentence commutation
Court blocks removal of transgender troops, but allows restrictions on recruits
item.description: An appeals court has affirmed a lower court's decision blocking the Department of Defense from removing current transgender servicemembers.
